subcodes.first_line: O thou who journeyest through the lands and gazest toward the direction of thy Lord's mercy, the Lord of creation, hearken thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها السائر فی البلاد و الناظر الی شطر رحمه ربک مالک الایجاد ان استمع
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @Moses, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection of Muhammad
